description: Hand-labelled semantic-retrieval set. Each query deliberately avoids the target note's keywords (synonyms/paraphrase) so it measures semantic lift, not lexical overlap. `relevant` lists the vault-relative path(s) that should rank first.

queries.query: how do leaves turn light into food
pedalling a bike up a steep hill
i can't fall asleep at night
a mountain that erupts and spews magma
a strong little italian coffee shot
scrambling data with a secret key
